title: sorghastrum elliottii
intro: Sorghastrum elliottii, also known as yellow indiangrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorghastrum elliottii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Sorghastrum elliottii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies.
